mapper.select: SELECT ATCH_FILE_ID, FILE_SN, STRG_TYPE_CD, FILE_CN, ORGNL_FILE_NM, FILE_TYPE FROM RDIATCHFILEMNG_TB WHERE ATCH_FILE_ID = #{atch_file_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT NVL(MAX(TO_NUMBER(REPLACE(EVNT_ID, 'EVNT_', ''))) + 1, 1) AS SEQ FROM RDIEVNTMNG_TB
mapper.insert:
MERGE INTO RDIEVNTMNG_TB USING DUAL ON ( EVNT_ID = #{evnt_id} ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET EVNT_SE = #{evnt_se}, BGNG_DT = #{bgng_dt}, END_DT = #{end_dt}, EVNT_CN = #{evnt_cn}, EVNT_CN2 = #{evnt_cn2}, WRKR = #{wrkr},
ATCH_FILE_ID = #{atch_file_id},
PROCS_ID = #{procs_id},
FCLT_ID = #{fclt_id},
FCLT_DTL_ID = #{fclt_dtl_id},
LAST_MDFCN_DT = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (EVNT_ID, EVNT_SE, BGNG_DT, END_DT, EVNT_CN, EVNT_CN2, WRKR,
ATCH_FILE_ID,
PROCS_ID,
FCLT_ID,
FCLT_DTL_ID,
REG_DT, LAST_MDFCN_DT) VALUES ( #{evnt_id}, #{evnt_se}, #{bgng_dt}, #{end_dt}, #{evnt_cn}, #{evnt_cn2}, #{wrkr},
#{atch_file_id},
#{procs_id},
#{fclt_id},
#{fclt_dtl_id},
SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT ROW_NUM, EVNT_SE, EVNT_SE_NM, SUBSTR(BGNG_DT, 0, 12) AS BGNG_DT, SUBSTR(END_DT, 0, 12) AS END_DT, EVNT_CN, WRKR FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY EVNT_SE ORDER BY BGNG_DT) AS ROW_NUM, EVNT_SE, ( SELECT CD_NM FROM RDICMMNCD_TB WHERE CD_SE = 'CD100' AND CD_ID = EVNT_SE ) AS EVNT_SE_NM, BGNG_DT, END_DT, EVNT_CN, WRKR FROM RDIEVNTMNG_TB WHERE SUBSTR(BGNG_DT, 0, 8) = #{bgng_dt} ) ORDER BY EVNT_SE, ROW_NUM, WRKR
